name: Smoked Salmon Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip the salmon into very small pieces with a pair of scissors.
2. Place the salmon in a bowl and sprinkle with lemon juice and ground black pepper.
3. Add mayonnaise and cream cheese to the salmon. Work together with a wooden spoon until evenly blended.
4. Spoon the mixture into 4 individual dishes and chill in the refrigerator for 2 hours.
5. Cut 4 thin slices of lemon or lime and make a cut in the center of each. Twist the slices and stand them on top of each serving of pate.
6. Add a small sprig of parsley or dill to garnish.
